zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure於1310年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克時，他的父親Gilbert Kennedy20歲，母親Lady Agnes Maxwell of Pollok19歲。他於1333年與Mary DeCarrick結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1385年10月20日在他的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure于1310年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克时，他的父亲Gilbert Kennedy20岁，母亲Lady Agnes Maxwell of Pollok19岁。他于1333年与Mary DeCarrick结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1385年10月20日在他的家乡享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure was born in 1310, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert Kennedy, was 20 and his mother, Lady Agnes Maxwell of Pollok, was 19. He married Mary DeCarrick in 1333. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 20 October 1385, in his hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure est né en 1310, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert Kennedy, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Maxwell of Pollok, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Mary DeCarrick en 1333. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 20 octobre 1385, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure 1310 in Carrick, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Kennedy 20 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes Maxwell of Pollok 19. Er hat 1333 Mary DeCarrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Oktober 1385 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure è nato il nel 1310 nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gilbert Kennedy, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes Maxwell of Pollok, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Mary DeCarrick nel 1333. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 ottobre 1385, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure(이)가 1310년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Kennedy(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Maxwell of Pollok(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1333년 Mary DeCarrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1385년 10월 20일 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.
